examples: In the cloister, hell is accepted in advance as a post obit on paradise.
When they're writing your obit while you're still alive, it's hard to have a good time.
Sideslip, sharp steer and obit deviation are the often occurrence of accidents during this process.
The Post website even invites readers into a dialogue with the obit writing staff.
Just the jokes and the winners... and the obit-reel, which is always a heart-tugger.
